_description: Unitree G1 → Gait 2392, side-step preset (freeze stance leg, no sagittal pelvis tx). For walking use unitree_g1_gait2392_walk.json or --bundled-mapping-g1-walk.
_pelvis_note: pelvis_orientation is null: world quaternion does not match OpenSim ground_pelvis angles without a dedicated transform.
_horizontal_note: lateral_scale:-1 flips pelvis left/right in OpenSim for this model/view.
_leg_asymmetry_note: freeze_opposite_leg=1 pins the stance leg at frame 0 so only the stepping leg moves (preview hack, not physics-accurate).
_left_leg_sign_note: Left leg *l coords use sign:-1 vs right (OpenSim femur_l vs G1 left chain). If only hip or only knee looks wrong, set that row back to sign:1.
_motor_order: 0-5 left leg: hip_pitch, hip_roll, hip_yaw, knee, ankle_pitch, ankle_roll
